summary: Phase 48 - Native Browser Popup Replacement Testing. All 22 window.confirm/window.prompt calls successfully replaced with branded ConfirmDialog/InputDialog. GREP check confirms zero remaining native popups in admin pages. Tested 11 admin pages with branded confirm dialogs working correctly. Input dialog for video URL tested with Escape key dismissal. Backdrop click and Cancel button dismissal verified.

minor.issue: Returns 'body stream already read' error - unrelated to confirm dialog feature

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 48 Native Popup Replacement fully tested. Key findings: (1) GREP check confirms 0 window.confirm/window.prompt in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/. (2) ConfirmProvider mounted in App.js wrapping route tree. (3) useConfirm() hook provides Promise-based confirm() function. (4) useInputDialog() hook provides promptInput() for text input (replaces window.prompt). (5) All branded dialogs use data-testid='app-confirm-dialog' or 'app-input-dialog'. (6) Confirm dialog has Cancel/Confirm buttons with data-testid='app-confirm-dialog-cancel/confirm'. (7) Input dialog has input field with data-testid='app-input-dialog-input'. (8) Dialogs close via backdrop click, Cancel button, or Escape key. (9) Reject fabric buttons exist but no pending fabrics in test data to verify. (10) AdminBrands page uses its own pre-existing ConfirmDialog component (not part of this phase).

confirm_provider.details: ConfirmProvider wrapped around route tree in App.js between HelmetProvider and CustomerAuthProvider

admin_coupons.details: Delete coupon opens branded modal with 'Confirm action' title and 'Delete coupon "LAUNCH20"?' message

admin_categories.details: Delete category opens branded modal with category-specific message

admin_blog.details: Posts tab delete opens branded modal. Categories/Tags tabs have 0 items (no delete buttons)

admin_sellers.details: Delete seller opens branded modal with seller name in message

admin_seller_detail.details: Delete fabric in SKUs tab opens branded modal. Reject button exists but no pending fabrics to test

admin_fabrics_delete.details: Delete fabric opens branded modal with fabric name

admin_fabrics_video_input.details: Add URL button opens input dialog with placeholder 'YouTube, Vimeo, or direct link'. Escape closes dialog.

modal_dismissal.details: Backdrop click closes confirm dialog. Cancel button closes dialog. Escape closes input dialog.

admin_brands_regression.details: Pre-existing ConfirmDialog flows still work (Suspend brand dialog). Reset PW opens form modal (expected).

not_tested.reject_fabric: No pending fabrics in test data - reject buttons exist but cannot be triggered
not_tested.bulk_rename_migration: API returns error 'body stream already read' - unrelated to confirm dialog feature
